CAMPAIGN 1
(BROAD)
Stabilisation Cheatsheet -
Grad Testing Phase 3 This phase, Phase 3, is all about taking our pre-
tested ad sets and ads, to see whether we can
stabilise performance before we optimise and
then scale.
We use proven audiences (from Phase 1) in
their own CBOs (defined by type: LAA, Broad,
Interest) and size as per the training guidance.
Now we have ad sets that we know work, we:
- Bring more audiences into play for growth
- Bring more ads/angles into play for stabilisation
and growth
- Share ad IDs where possible to share social
proof and partial ad history
- Use a mixture of rules and judgements to
manage the stabilisation period after graduating
our ads.
- The goal is to achieve then maintain positive
KPIs before we consider scaling to ensure our
testing works.

Notes:
- Continue to use the posts in 'Social Proof'
campaigns to maintain engagement growth
- Ad sets/ads do not pass beyond this stage.
Phase 3 is about stability first, where we're
trying to reduce yoyo results
- We then focus on optimising for profitability
followed by scaling all in the same Phase 3
campaigns.
